title: About Me
paragraphs: Hi my name is Ahmad Al Desrahim, you can call me aldes, I am from Indonesia.

I am a Full Stack Web Developer at PT. FTF Globalindo, I've been working here since 2020. Basically what I am doing here is building web apps for local district governments, our main apps are tax services: property taxes, tax on acquisition of land and building rights and various kinds of local taxes and regional retribution. I am also working on the payments by cooperating with local banks and payment gateway.
I am also a college student at UNINDRA majoring Informatics Engineering.

I graduated from Vocational High School 24 in Jakarta majoring Software Engineering (RPL). I've learned a lot from this school, I started learning C++, Java and PHP. And not just that, I also learned about networking, basics of system operations, some diagrams or charts and Database Management System (DBMS).
About my programming skills, my main coding language is PHP. I've used it since high school, and I really enjoyed it. I've been using several PHP Frameworks such as Laravel, Codeigniter, Yii2.
But not just that, I also understand (a lot of) Javascript, a little bit of Java and Kotlin. I am also using TailwindCSS, AlpineJS, Livewire on several projects.
